zh.lifeSummary: Margaret O'Kennedy於1420年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達康瑙特 布里奇。她於1440年與Donnchadh of Carrigogunnll MacBrian在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達康瑙特 布里奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret O'Kennedy于1420年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達康瑙特 布里奇。她于1440年与Donnchadh of Carrigogunnll MacBrian在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達康瑙特 布里奇结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: O'Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret O'Kennedy was born in 1420, in Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Ireland. She married Donnchadh of Carrigogunnll MacBrian in 1440, in Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret O'Kennedy est née en 1420, à Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Irlande. Elle a épousé Donnchadh of Carrigogunnll MacBrian en 1440, à Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret O'Kennedy wurde 1420 in Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Irland geboren. Sie hat 1440 in Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Irland Donnchadh of Carrigogunnll MacBrian geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret O'Kennedy è nata il nel 1420 nel Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Irlanda. Lei sposato Donnchadh of Carrigogunnll MacBrian nel 1440, nel Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Irelan: アイルランドコウントイ キルダアコナウト ブリッジ
ja.Thomond Manor, Connaught Bridge, Kildare: アイルランドコウントイ キルダアコナウト ブリッジ
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret O'Kennedyは1420年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアコナウト ブリッジで生まれた。1440年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアコナウト ブリッジでDonnchadh of Carrigogunnll MacBrianと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret O'Kennedy(은)는 1420년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 콘오그h트 브리지에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1440년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 콘오그h트 브리지에서 Donnchadh of Carrigogunnll MacBrian(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret O'Kennedy nasceu em 1420, em Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Irlanda. Ela casou-se com Donnchadh of Carrigogunnll MacBrian em 1440, em Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret O'Kennedy родилась в 1420 г. в местности коннот бридж, коунти каилдар, Ирландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donnchadh of Carrigogunnll MacBrian в 1440 г. в местности коннот бридж, коунти каилдар, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret O'Kennedy nació en 1420, en Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Irlanda. Se casó con Donnchadh of Carrigogunnll MacBrian en 1440, en Connaught Bridge, County Kildare, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en su pueblo.
